metadata.channel_runtime_operation_specs_json: {"ack_inbound":{"label":"Ack Inbound","operator_hint":"Loong calls this after one inbound message is processed.","sample_payload":{"message_id":"demo-message"},"summary":"Acknowledge one inbound message after processing."},"complete_batch":{"label":"Complete Batch","operator_hint":"Loong calls this after the current receive_batch cycle is fully drained.","sample_payload":{"batch_cursor":"cursor-1"},"summary":"Mark the current receive batch as fully processed."},"receive_batch":{"label":"Receive Batch","operator_hint":"Loong polls this operation before dispatching inbound bridge messages.","sample_payload":{"limit":10},"summary":"Poll one inbound bridge batch for channel delivery."},"send_message":{"label":"Send Message","operator_hint":"Loong uses this operation for outbound sends on the selected channel surface.","sample_payload":{"target":"weixin:contact:demo","text":"hello"},"summary":"Send one outbound bridge message for the selected channel target."}}
